title: calophyllum costulatum
intro: Calophyllum costulatum, also known as the Costulate Calophyllum, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. This tree has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been attributed to the presence of various bioactive compounds such as calophyllic acid and costunolide. The health benefits of Calophyllum costulatum include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and fever, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In traditional medicine, the bark, leaves, and seeds of the tree are often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
